popup_emptyHint.message: Press a button above to load your chats.

popup_listFetchFailed.message: Couldn't load the list — try again in a moment

opt_autosaveHint.message: Changes save automatically. There's no save button.

opt_agentHint.message: Decides the resume command and session format.

opt_autoSyncHint.message: Auto sync only runs while a tab for that service is open.

opt_embedHint.message: Embeds images as base64. Turn off for lighter session files.

opt_pathHint.message: Leave empty to use the default folder.

opt_sharedPathHint.message: Put the same path in all three and they share one folder — the dedupe index merges too, so all three services show up in a single resume list. Give each service its own path and the lists split accordingly.

opt_indexHint.message: The only file created here is the index $1. It holds pairs of “web chat → saved session”, not the chats themselves. Full transcripts go where Claude Code reads them — set $2 and they land in $3. With Codex as the default agent they go under $4 instead.

extDesc.message: Save claude.ai, ChatGPT and Gemini chats as local Claude Code / Codex sessions and continue them in your terminal.
